description.value:
A rigid tube-shaped sling capable of launching various types of ammunition including bullets, bolts, and arrows. The tube's design allows for a wide spread of fire.

Basic: Two-Handed, Ranged d6 (60/180), Reload (object interaction), Conceal, Hipshot

Damage types: Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing depending on ammunition used.

rmeData.masterPerk: You can pack up to a full container of ammunition into the sling tube. As an action, you can launch all the ammunition in a 30 foot cone. Each creature in the cone must make a Dexterity saving throw. A target takes a number of weapon dice damage equal to your proficiency bonus on a failed save, or none on a success.
